content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement Governing the Inspection of Stockholder List
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_14_nda_11

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – purpose of the Confidential Material
type PartyRole = | Company(unit) | Stockholder(unit)

type Party = {
    role: PartyRole,
    name: string
}

type ConfidentialMaterial = {
    produced_by: Party,          # the Party that supplies the material
    purpose: string,             # textual description of the permitted purpose
    contains_confidential_info: bool
}

type Object = {
    description: string,
    embodies_confidential_info: bool
}

type ReverseEngineeringEvent = {
    obj: Object,
    attempted: bool
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – public model objects
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 0 – parties to the Agreement
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: Party

@ Clause 0 – material that may be inspected
entity confidential_material: ConfidentialMaterial

@ Clause 0 – any object that could embody the confidential information
entity object: Object

@ Clause 0 – record of a reverse‑engineering attempt (if any)
entity reverse_engineering_event: ReverseEngineeringEvent

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper Functions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – check that the purpose is “reasonably related to Stockholder’s interests”
func purpose_is_permitted(pur: string) -> bool:
    pur == "reasonably related to Stockholder’s interests"

@ Clause 4 – placeholder for the notification to the Company (pure function, always true when called)
func notify_company() -> bool:
    true

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – normative requirements
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Use of Confidential Material is limited to the permitted purpose
@ Clause 1
rule O use_confidential_material_for_permitted_purpose:
    purpose_is_permitted(confidential_material.purpose) always

# 2. Receiving Party must not disclose, publish or communicate Confidential Material
@ Clause 2
rule F disclose_confidential_material:
    confidential_material.contains_confidential_info always

# 3. If disclosure is required by law, the Receiving Party must give prompt notice
@ Clause 3
rule O give_prompt_notice_when_legal_disclosure_required:
    (confidential_material.contains_confidential_info implies notify_company()) always

# 4. Receiving Party shall not reverse‑engineer any object that embodies Confidential Information
@ Clause 1 (hypothesis)
rule F reverse_engineer_prohibited:
    reverse_engineering_event.obj.embodies_confidential_info
    and reverse_engineering_event.attempted always

# 5. Jurisdiction – parties submit to Delaware Court of Chancery
@ Clause 4
rule O submit_to_delaware_chancery_jurisdiction:
    true always   # (the rule is a placeholder indicating the agreement’s jurisdiction)

# 6. Remedy – breach causes irreparable harm; specific performance / injunctive relief applies
@ Clause 5
rule O specific_performance_and_injunctive_relief_available:
    true always

# 7. No amendment except a signed writing
@ Clause 6
rule O amendment_requires_written_agreement:
    true always

# 8. Agreement binds parties and their successors, assigns, etc.
@ Clause 7
rule O binding_on_successors_and_assigns:
    true always

# 9. Governing law – State of Delaware
@ Clause 8
rule O governed_by_delaware_law:
    true always

# 10. Execution in counterparts
@ Clause 9
rule O execution_in_multiple_counterparts:
    true always

# 11. Entire agreement clause
@ Clause 10
rule O entire_agreement_clause:
    true always

# 12. No construction against author
@ Clause 11
rule O no_construction_against_author:
    true always
```
